title: grewia decemovulata
intro: Grewia decemovulata, also known as the ten-ovule grewia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and skin infections. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight bacteria, and promote healing, making it a valuable resource for treating a range of health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
